content.en:
The Feng Heng controller couldn't wait to extinguish the incarnation of the border fire controller casually, but if he thought about it carefully, since he had already come, if he ran for nothing, wouldn't he have earned nothing?

"What do you guys say?"

The Wind Heng Controller looked at the others.

"I'm going, since I'm here, naturally I can't just leave, and besides, it's only close to the inner perimeter of the wasteland, and it's not really the inner perimeter!" Ye Tian said.

He is not afraid of danger, anyway, he is copying the body, for the sake of the two statues of ten thousand phases, it is worth the risk.

"I'll go too!" The White Shark Controller said lightly: "Although it is close to the inner perimeter of the wasteland, unless it is very unlucky, it is unlikely that we will encounter mortal danger that can make our Nine Realm-level controllers encounter mortal danger, and we can rescue the Border Fire Controller and escape as soon as possible, there should be no problem." "

The Crowe Controller also nodded, he also felt that as long as they didn't enter the inner circle of the wasteland, with their strength, it shouldn't be a problem.

Seeing that several controllers agreed, Feng Heng's controllers also nodded slightly.

"In that case, let's move on!" said the Wind Heng Controller.

Subsequently, Ye Tian's several controllers continued to move forward with the border fire controllers.

In a short time, they came to a place very close to the inner perimeter of the wasteland.

"A few seniors, it's here!"

The controller of the border fire was very respectful and said in fear.

Ye Tian sensed this place and immediately frowned, because the environment here seemed to be very special.

The aura of the wasteland is incomparably strong, and it has a terrifying killing power.

Countless wasteland auras gradually intertwined into killing formations, and these formations could even inflict fatal damage to the Eight Realms-level masters.

And there's a bit of wasteland life here.

The intelligence of these wasteland creatures is also very low, but their strength is not weak, and the strength of many wasteland creatures has reached the level of the eternal master.

Ye Tian even sensed a wasteland creature comparable to the level of an eight-realm master.

Of course, these wasteland creatures are certainly not comparable to those forbidden creatures in the wasteland.

However, this place is very close to the inner wasteland, and if you fight here, it is easy to attract the forbidden life of the inner wasteland, in that case, they will be dangerous!

Once you fall here, there is both the threat of the formation and the threat of these wasteland creatures.

At this time, the border fire controller said: "A few seniors, I am trapped in a formation, there is no way to break the formation, and even if I am lucky enough to break the formation, those wasteland creatures outside will stop me, so I can't get out at all now, and ask a few seniors to break the formation to save me out." As for the rewards I promised, I will honor them one by one to several seniors, and even give away my other treasures one by one. "

"Tell me, in which formation, we'll tear the formation apart and rescue you immediately!" said the Feng Heng master.

The Border Fire Controller immediately pointed to a formation in the distance and said, "Wind Heng Controller, I'm trapped in that formation. "

The Feng Heng controller was about to make a move to tear apart the formation, but at this moment, Ye Tian stopped and said, "Feng Heng controller, please wait a minute, I'm afraid there are some problems." "

"What's the problem, we should immediately take action to get the border fire controller out, we can't delay time here, in case the time is delayed and something happens, it will be troublesome!" Feng Heng said with a frown.

Ye Tian looked at the Border Fire Controller and sneered, "Border Fire Master, your true body is not in that formation, right?"

Hearing this, the Crowe Controller, the Wind Heng Controller, and the White Shark Controller suddenly changed their faces, revealing a vigilant look, and at the same time, their breath locked on the side controller.

"Infinite Master, what do you mean? I don't quite understand?" asked the Ice and Fire Master, confused.

At this time, Ye Tian confessed: "I have a special ability, I can sense that there is no life in this formation, although I don't know what is in the formation, but you are definitely not in this formation!"

"Infinite Master, are you sure?" asked the Wind Heng Master.

"I'm sure. Ye Tian assured.

If it weren't for his talent for copying, he wouldn't have dared to guarantee it.

It was precisely because he was 100% sure that he would stop Feng Heng's controller from making a move.

At this moment, the Border Fire Master directly annihilated his own avatar.

Seeing this scene, the Crowe Controller and Feng Heng suddenly looked confused.

Ye Tian guessed: "If I am not mistaken, once we attack this formation, I am afraid that there will be an accident, and the border fire controller is probably not trapped." "

The Wind Heng Controller also guessed the approximate reason, "I'm afraid the Ice and Fire Controller wants us to attract the attention of something, it seems that he has found something good, and he has to do so at the risk of offending our three Nine Realm-level controllers." It seems that the value of that treasure is even enough to make the Nine Realms level controllers crazy!"

Suddenly, the three Nine Realm-level Controllers, the Wind Heng Controller, the Crowe Controller, and the White Shark Controller, all showed interest.

However, they can't stay here, and they must find the Border Fire Master as soon as possible so that they can know what the Border Fire Master is planning.

Once they find the Border Fire Master, they will not hesitate to kill him once they understand the purpose.

After all, because the Eight Realm-level controllers dared to play with their Ninth Realm-level controllers, they were simply looking for death!

......

Somewhere in the wasteland, not too far away.

The Border Fire Controller lamented: "Failed, the foolproof plan was actually discovered by the Infinite Controller, that formation is enough to shield the perception of the Nine Realms level controller, how can the Infinite Controller detect that the formation does not have his true body?"

His original purpose was to attract a few Nine Realm-level controllers to the past, once Ye Tian and them broke that formation, it would immediately cause a chain change in that area, triggering many killing formations.

In addition, he arranged some gadgets, which were enough to instantly drag down these Nine Realm-level masters, forcing them to fight these wasteland creatures.

After a little delay, the forbidden life of the inner wasteland close to here will come over and kill Ye Tian and them.

In this way, he has a chance, a chance to capture an amazing treasure.

In order to seize that treasure, he was desperate enough, and even offended a few Nine Realm-level controllers, he did not hesitate.

After all, after obtaining that treasure, he could advance to the Nine Realms level master, and even becoming a Ten Realms level controller in the future is not without a chance.

For this reason, what is it to offend the other Nine Realm-level masters.

It's a big deal, before he grows, he just doesn't go back to the Origin Realm River.

Could it be that Ye Tian and they can still find him, but can't they kill him?
